overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a rainy cyberpunk city at night. The player moves from a covered walkway across a neon-lit intersection, under an overpass, up to a rooftop plaza, and through a dark corridor. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, holographic billboards, and futuristic architecture typical of games like Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: approaching and stepping onto the illuminated yellow crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the covered walkway toward the street intersection, passing support pillars

notable_agents.action: walking across the crosswalk ahead of the camera

entered.detail: concrete overhang providing shelter from rain
large structural column with green neon accent lighting
large holographic advertisement with purple and pink neon colors
bright yellow zebra crossing with green walk signal text
elevated highway or monorail track spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered walkway with wet concrete pavement reflecting neon lights. The camera moves forward toward a street intersection, approaching a yellow crosswalk. A large holographic billboard glows on the right while an overpass structure looms ahead. Sparse pedestrians are visible crossing the street.

events.description: exits open crosswalk and enters narrower street under the concrete overpass
futuristic vehicle drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk and continuing straight under the overpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with headlights on driving past the camera position

entered.detail: vertical neon signs for cyberpunk-style shops and restaurants
red and gray electrical or utility boxes on the sidewalk
large screen displaying weapon or product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the yellow crosswalk and enters a narrower street beneath a massive concrete overpass. The environment becomes more enclosed with neon shop signs lining the left side. A futuristic vehicle passes by on the right. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful neon lighting from above.

events.description: approaching and beginning to ascend the concrete stairs on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking along the shop-lined street under the overpass, approaching a concrete stairway entrance

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward to an elevated level
metal safety railing along the edge of the walkway
scattered trash bags and debris against the building wall

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the overpass, the camera moves along a narrower sidewalk with shops on the left. The path leads toward a concrete staircase ascending to an upper level. Metal railings line the right side of the path, and trash debris is visible against the walls. The lighting remains dominated by neon signs and street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop plaza with benches and digital displays

events.description: ascends stairs and emerges onto the open rooftop plaza with city views
lighting shifts from enclosed neon underpass to open night sky with plaza lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs and walking across the open rooftop plaza

notable_agents.action: standing near the edge of the rooftop looking out at the city lights

entered.detail: open concrete plaza area with geometric tile patterns
concrete bench seating on the rooftop
large billboard displaying tropical palm tree imagery
distant illuminated skyscrapers and cityscape visible from the rooftop

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the stairs and emerges onto a wide-open rooftop plaza. The space features concrete benches, large digital billboards displaying tropical scenes, and views of the distant city skyline. The overpass structure is now visible to the left rather than overhead. The lighting changes from enclosed neon to open night sky with artificial plaza lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop transition area leading to dark service corridor

events.description: approaching and entering the dark corridor with minimal lighting ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across the rooftop toward a dark entrance, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera wearing red top and patterned pants

entered.detail: dark opening leading into a covered walkway or tunnel
accumulated trash and debris bags on the rooftop corner
HVAC units and ventilation structures on the rooftop

segments.scene_description: Walking across the rooftop plaza toward a dark corridor entrance. The area becomes dimmer as the camera approaches the dark opening. Other pedestrians are visible walking in the opposite direction. Trash piles and ventilation equipment are visible on the right side. The city lights remain visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark pedestrian underpass or service corridor

events.description: enters the dark corridor with concrete walls and minimal lighting
emerging from the dark corridor back into the lit city street area

agents.ego_description: moving through the dark corridor toward the distant light at the exit

entered.detail: dark concrete walls of the service corridor
faint neon lights visible at the far end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark, narrow corridor with concrete walls and minimal lighting. The path leads forward toward a distant glow of neon lights marking the exit. The environment is enclosed and shadowy, with only faint light sources visible ahead. The segment ends as the camera emerges back into a lit street area with visible trash and city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit intersection into the enclosed, gritty underbelly of a futuristic city. It begins under a covered walkway with wet concrete reflecting vibrant lights, moving forward toward a yellow crosswalk as a large holographic billboard glows to the right. As the camera crosses the street, the environment shifts from the open intersection to a narrower passage beneath a massive concrete overpass, where futuristic vehicles pass by and colorful shop signs line the wet asphalt. The scene then tightens further as the camera follows a sidewalk flanked by metal railings and urban debris, moving deeper into the shadows of the overpass. Finally, the path leads toward a concrete staircase ascending to an upper level, with the lighting remaining dominated by the glow of neon signs and street lamps.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from an enclosed space into an expansive rooftop plaza before descending back into a claustrophobic urban corridor. It begins as the camera climbs stairs to emerge into the open night air, where the lighting shifts from neon enclosures to a wide plaza featuring concrete benches and large digital billboards of tropical scenes. As the camera moves across the rooftop, the environment gradually dims, passing pedestrians and piles of ventilation equipment while the distant city skyline remains visible to the left. The scene then shifts as the camera enters a dark, narrow concrete corridor, trading the open sky for shadowy walls and minimal lighting. Finally, the path leads forward through the gloom toward a distant neon glow, ending as the camera emerges back into a lit street area filled with city lights and debris.
